## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss blog performance, content strategy, and lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog performance is concerning: No articles published since September have generated more than 2 leads in the US](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [Content strategy needs reevaluation: High volume of blogs (40/month) not translating to proportional lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Data analysis improvements needed: Normalize data to identify patterns in blog performance and lead generation timing](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [US lead generation improving: 36 leads YTD, outpacing other countries, but still room for growth](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)

## Topics

### Blog Performance and Lead Generation

  - [430 articles developed total, with recent backlog due to Prateek's absence](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [255 total leads generated since August 2024, but only focusing on data since January 2025](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [US lead generation: 36 leads YTD, followed by India (15), UK, Turkey, and Canada](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
  - [Concerning trend: No articles published after September generated more than 2 US leads](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [Monthly performance (May): 46 articles published, 8,200 clicks, 3 million impressions (30% growth), but stagnant click growth](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)

### Content Strategy Reevaluation

  - [Current strategy of 40 blogs/month not translating to proportional lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Need to identify patterns in successful content to develop a scalable approach](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [Suggestion to focus on video-related topics and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Abhishek emphasized the importance of offering alternatives and solutions in tariff-related blogs](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)

### Data Analysis Improvements

  - [Need to normalize data to understand:](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
    1.  When maximum engagement occurs after blog publication
    2.  Which weeks or periods generate the most clicks
  - [Challenges with URL changes (www subdomain removal, forward slash changes) complicating analysis](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [Prateek to provide more detailed insights in Thursday's call](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)

### Technical SEO and Site Structure

  - [Discussion about redirect chains and potential SEO impact](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Recent changes in URL structure (removal of www subdomain, forward slash changes)](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Cameron to investigate and address any problematic redirect chains](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)

### Upcoming Content

  - [New topics suggested: Beauty, CPG, Electronics, Fashion, Global Retail e-commerce, small e-commerce businesses](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [VivaTech blogs to be published by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to provide normalized data on blog performance and lead generation timing by Thursday's call](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1967.0)
  - [Analyze when leads were generated for top-performing articles to identify patterns](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
  - [Ritesh to hand off lead analysis to Celine for more detailed information on lead outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Investigate reasons for high lead generation in unexpected countries (e.g., Turkey)](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)
  - [Reevaluate content strategy to focus on topics and formats that generate more leads](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [Cameron to investigate and address any problematic redirect chains](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Discuss custom backlinks and author profiles in Thursday's call](https://fathom.video/share/WRaog2ix_SZQaRLp1PB36woe4EGYNNPv?tab=summary&timestamp=2085.0)
